summary: Frontend-only testing of SnapRoad UI improvements. All 5 requested features verified working correctly: App Tour with close button and 7 scrollable steps, Fuel Dashboard with nearby gas prices, Car Studio tab renamed from Skins, Leaderboard with premium podium display, and Challenge modal with scrollable content.

issues: Close button has decorative circle overlay that can intercept clicks - use force=True to click

critical_code_review_comments: App Tour: Has close button (X) with data-testid='tour-close-btn', scrollable content with 7 steps, and 'Start Driving!' button
Fuel Dashboard: Shows 'Nearby Gas Prices' section with Shell ($3.29), BP ($3.35), Speedway ($3.19) - MOCKED data as specified
Car Studio: Tab renamed from 'Skins' to 'Car Studio' in rewards section, shows current vehicle and color
Leaderboard: Premium podium display for top 3 (1st gold, 2nd silver, 3rd bronze), time filters (All Time/Week/Month), state filter, close button
Challenge Modal: Has close button with data-testid='challenge-close', scrollable content with duration and stake options
test_credentials: No credentials needed - used fresh registration flow
seed_data_creation: Created test account via registration, completed onboarding (plan selection + car selection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI improvements verified. Onboarding flow: Start Driving -> Register -> Plan Selection -> Car Type -> Car Color -> App Tour. Gas prices are MOCKED data (Shell $3.29, BP $3.35, Speedway $3.19).

app_tour_modal.description: App tour shown after completing onboarding

tour_steps: Interactive Map - Pinch to zoom, drag to pan. Find nearby offers!
Collect Gems - Tap glowing gems on the map to redeem discounts
Meet Orion - Your voice assistant - tap the purple mic button
Drive Safe - Earn points for smooth braking and safe driving
Track Analytics - Monitor fuel, savings, and your driver score
Customize Your Ride - Unlock new colors and car styles as you level up
Compete & Win - Challenge friends and climb the leaderboard

fuel_dashboard.description: Driver Analytics modal with nearby gas prices

car_studio_tab.description: Rewards tab renamed from 'Skins' to 'Car Studio'

mocked_data_note: Gas prices are MOCKED data as specified in review request (Shell $3.29, BP $3.35, Speedway $3.19)
